posts.author: chip.willard (Chip Willard)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

A user in my company has been having the automations redirect show up consistently on her computer when utilizing monday. Attached is a screenshot of the page in question. We’ve gone through the “get started” screen and logged her back in on the login/create an account page that follows and the redirect continues to show up. While this is a minor issue, it’s been happening for a while.

Monday issue2072×1270 251 KB
